blurbs.author: Suzanne Cloud, Broad Street Review
blurbs.quote: McLucas…did a careful study of how this production should flow, and his expert attention shows…Stones in His Pockets…is a must-see.

theater: South Camden Theatre Company - Camden, NJ
title: Stones in His Pockets

theater: On The Rocks, Asian Arts Initiative - Philadelphia, PA
title: our ouija board, the games we played, the shit we conjured, & the dead dude we hate-fucked

blurbs.author: Toby Zinman, Philadelphia Inquirer
blurbs.quote: McLucas…does crank up his Jason…we see some actual acting.

theater: Automatic Arts, Christ Church Neighborhood House - Philadelphia, PA
title: Pure Medea

blurbs.author: Bonaly, Bonaly Reviews
blurbs.quote: McLucas navigated characters with internalized systemic sexism, racism, and homophobia with humanity...portraying [a] specific and heart wrenching character arc.

blurbs.author: Cameron Kelsall, Broad Street Review
blurbs.quote: McLucas...communicate[s] the duality of [his] character with practiced ease.

theater: On The Rocks, Vox Populi - Philadelphia, PA
title: Wolfcrush: A Queer Werewolf Play

blurbs.author: Deb Miller, DC Metro Theater Arts
blurbs.quote: McLucas as the best man is a study in laughable libidinous machismo.

theater: On The Rocks, The Beard Cave - Philadelphia, PA
title: The Groom's a Fag; The Bride's a Cunt; The Best Man's a Whore; and the Maiden of Honor (Just) Hung Herself in the Closet

blurbs.author: Sally Friedman, The Intelligencer
blurbs.quote: The South Camden Theatre Company production proves that an ambitious company — and one in a unlikely location — can still inspire, lead us to question, remind us of our innate conflicts, and most of all, help us to remember that family, no matter how harmonious or conflicted, is a taproot for us all.

blurbs.author: Tim Dunleavy, DC Metro Theater Arts
blurbs.quote: South Camden Theatre Company's stark production, directed in a straightforward fashion by Josh McLucas, tells the story in a quietly powerful fashion...it sparkles with life...

theater: South Camden Theatre Company - Camden, NJ
title: My Name Is Asher Lev

theater: [redacted] Theater Company, The Rotunda - Philadelphia, PA
title: The Art of Wasting Time

blurbs.author: Deb Miller, Phindie
blurbs.quote: The five supporting actors...are thoroughly skilled in their facility with the Elizabethan language, and compelling in their understanding of the characters' emotions and motivations

theater: The Mechanical Theater, Laurel Hill Cemetery - Philadelphia, PA
title: Richard III

blurbs.author: Ruth K Brown, New Jersey Stage
blurbs.quote: McLucas gives a strong performance...[he] is clear and believable in the midst of the chaos.

theater: South Camden Theatre Company - Camden, NJ
title: The House of Blue Leaves

blurbs.author: Lisa Panzer, Phindie
blurbs.quote: You are advised, before the show takes off, to secure your seat belt. DO it.
